Brainstorm the FULL Product spec, before sending to both opus/codex use an opus agent to ask me questions for high-level user guidance gathering to understand the product further. Use 5 opus agents in parallel to come up with questions.

The high-level of the product we're building:

Olas is a private-first instagram for small communities (like families or closed groups). Uses NIP-29 and perhaps MLS later (for now we only build the NIP-29 part). Flow typically will be people download the app to invite others or are invited into someone's app. The main feed is a feed of all posts from people in all the groups the user belongs to. A per-group view is necessary. Media is either images or videos using the proper NIPs for images or videos. Comments are NIP-22 comments. The UX must be highly cared for, specially during invite but throughout the product needs to be highly polished. We need market research performed online to research how people express their interest in a product like this and what features they want as well as competitive market landscape; without any mention of “nostr” we need to identify a way of differentiating the app.
assistant

Synthesized 30 questions from 5 Opus agents into a structured product guidance questionnaire covering who the product is for, onboarding, privacy promises, community lifecycle, feed/posting, and competitive positioning.
